name: ChickenGenius
tagline: Point your phone at your flock. Know what's wrong before you lose a bird.
market: 13M US households keeping backyard chickens. Avg spend $500–1,500/yr on feed, supplements, coops. Accelerated by egg price surges and urban homesteading trend.
verdict: Largest underserved market on the list. 13M chicken-keeping households and not one AI photo health diagnosis app exists. The Genius formula maps perfectly: photo of bird → health score → buy the supplement. Repeat-purchase consumables (feed, treatments) make affiliate revenue evergreen.

name: HVACGenius
tagline: Snap your air filter. Know if your HVAC is killing your air quality.
market: 100M+ US homes with HVAC. 70M+ homeowner-occupied. Air filter market $3B/yr. Every homeowner has a filter they change inconsistently.
verdict: Largest TAM on the list. Air filters are a $15–50 recurring purchase every 1–3 months — affiliate revenue is practically automatic. Existing HVAC apps all target professional technicians, leaving the homeowner market completely open. The 'snap your dirty filter' hook is visually obvious and shareable.

name: CigarGenius
tagline: Your humidor, diagnosed. Your sticks, protected.
market: 13M US premium cigar smokers. High-income demographic spending $1,500–5,000/yr. US luxury cigar market $15B in 2024, growing 7.5% CAGR.
verdict: Small but affluent market with sky-high purchase intent. Boveda packs, hygrometers, and humidors are recurring/upgrade purchases. Existing apps require proprietary hardware — a photo-first AI approach wins on accessibility. High willingness to pay for premium tools in this demographic.

name: KoiGenius
tagline: Your pond, scored. Your koi, thriving.
market: 1.5–2M US koi pond owners. Global koi market $1.2–3B, growing 9–12% CAGR. Among the highest-spending hobbyists — single fish can cost $500–50,000.
verdict: Direct extension of existing SpaGenius/AquariumGenius architecture — test strip scan + water chemistry score + fish health photo. KoiControl has some traction but zero AI photo scoring. Build speed advantage is significant given Jeff already has the water chemistry scan pipeline built.

name: ReptileGenius
tagline: Your bearded dragon deserves a health score.
market: 7M US reptile-owning households. US reptile industry ~$1.5B. High-spend on UVB lighting, heating, enclosures. Bearded dragons, ball pythons, and leopard geckos are dominant species.
verdict: Reptile keepers are massively underserved by tech. Existing apps only do species identification — none offer habitat health scoring or AI photo diagnosis. UVB bulb replacement reminders alone drive recurring affiliate revenue. Strong AI angle with genuinely life-saving potential (MBD, respiratory infections caught early).
